overview: Digital Zindagi is a premium multi-vendor marketplace PWA for the Indian market. It features real-time admin control, provider discovery with GPS filtering, a delivery module with OTP verification, student tools, video gallery with AdMob, and an isometric alien shooter game — all manageable from a single Admin Panel.
features: Real-time Admin Panel with 1-2 second sync to all users
Category, News, Jobs, Custom Code full CRUD from admin
Isometric Alien Shooter game accessible from sidebar menu
GPS-based provider discovery with 2/5/10 KM radius
Delivery module with OTP verification and wallet system
Video Gallery with AdMob interstitials and anti-AdBlock fallback
Student tools: Image Resizer, AI Enhancer, Age Calculator, Percentage Calculator
PWA install as standalone app with custom Digital Zindagi branding
Multi-role access: Super Admin, Manager, Provider, Customer, Delivery Boy
30-day session persistence with safe in-app WebView
